rationale: Review 1 identifies a real proof-quality improvement in `fiberHomeomorph`: the current non-`only` `simp` closes a substantive fibre-invariance equivalence using the ambient simp set, and the suggested `simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff, map_proj]` is grounded in the shown goal. Acting on it would make the proof slightly more robust and explicit, while Review 2 would leave that minor brittleness unchanged.
